overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk Ripperdoc clinic interior in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a braindance crime scene investigation through stairwells, medical rooms, and neon-lit lounge areas.

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs of a back service entrance

entered.detail: industrial concrete staircase with worn steps ascending upward
green painted metal handrail along the stairwell wall
flickering fluorescent light fixture mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a narrow industrial concrete stairwell. Fluorescent lights provide dim illumination as the camera moves steadily upward, with metal railings visible along the left wall.

events.description: exits stairwell into upper utility corridor with supply storage

agents.ego_description: moving through doorways into the back rooms of the medical facility

entered.detail: rotating ceiling fan with light fixture in the upper landing area
metal shelving units stocked with boxes and medical supplies
stacked cardboard storage boxes on the floor

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell into a utility corridor, the camera moves through doorways into storage areas. Ceiling fans rotate overhead while supply shelves and cardboard boxes line the walls, indicating a back-of-house medical facility area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ripperdoc clinic autopsy room with braindance equipment

events.description: enters main clinic area revealing a crime scene with blood splatter and surgical equipment
activates braindance interface to examine the corpse on the examination table

agents.ego_description: examining the corpse on the surgical table using the braindance investigation interface

notable_agents.action: dead body lying on examination table with severe trauma and blood

entered.detail: stainless steel surgical table with bloodied corpse
mutilated body of a female victim on the examination table
extensive blood pools and splatter patterns across the tiled floor
bright adjustable surgical lamp illuminating the examination area
tall bank of metal lockers for medical storage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main clinic autopsy room, revealing a gruesome crime scene with blood pooling on the floor. A corpse lies on the central examination table under bright surgical lights, and the player activates a braindance interface to investigate the body. Medical lockers line the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: clinic main floor with red ambient lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from surgical white to red neon ambient as camera moves into main clinic floor

agents.ego_description: exploring the main clinic floor with medical beds and red neon lighting

entered.detail: red neon light strips illuminating the wall and medical equipment
empty medical examination bed with restraints
medical monitoring displays showing vital signs and data

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the crime scene, the lighting shifts dramatically to red neon as the camera explores the main clinic floor. Medical beds and monitoring equipment become visible under the red ambient glow, while the examination area with the body falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge with purple neon lighting

events.description: enters lounge area with vibrant purple and blue neon lighting
security laser grid becomes visible across a doorway on the right

agents.ego_description: moving through the lounge area observing the security laser grid and neon furniture

entered.detail: vibrant purple neon strips and ambient lighting throughout the lounge
modern purple chairs and circular seating arrangement
zebra-patterned circular rug under the lounge table
red laser beams forming a security grid across a doorway
flatscreen television mounted on the wall displaying content

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an upscale lounge area bathed in purple neon light. Modern furniture sits atop a patterned circular rug, while a security laser grid blocks a doorway to the right. The atmosphere shifts from clinical to luxurious with ambient lighting.

events.description: enters private bedroom through a dark corridor

agents.ego_description: exploring the bedroom with unmade bed and holographic ceiling display

entered.detail: unmade bed with rumpled sheets and pillows
glowing blue holographic interface projected on the ceiling
pink neon light strips along the wall
small desk with chair and computer equipment

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark corridor into a private bedroom, the camera reveals an unmade bed and a striking holographic display projected on the ceiling. Pink neon lights provide ambient illumination while a desk sits against the far wall.

events.description: enters kitchen break room with table and vending machines
loops back to the main clinic area with red lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through kitchen area and returning to the main clinic floor

entered.detail: rectangular table with folding chairs for break room seating
large refrigerator unit against the wall
lit vending machine with product display

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a kitchen break room containing a table, chairs, refrigerator, and vending machine. The camera then loops back through doorways, returning to the main clinic area with red neon lighting visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transforms from a dim industrial ascent into a neon-drenched exploration of a high-tech medical facility and private quarters. It begins with a steady climb up a narrow concrete stairwell under dim fluorescent lights before exiting into a utility corridor filled with rotating ceiling fans and storage crates. The camera then enters a bright autopsy room to investigate a blood-stained crime scene, after which the lighting shifts dramatically to a red neon glow as it moves across the main clinic floor and its monitoring equipment. This clinical atmosphere transitions into a luxurious lounge bathed in purple neon and guarded by laser grids, leading further into a private bedroom illuminated by pink lights and a ceiling hologram. Finally, the movement passes through a functional kitchen break room before looping back through the doorways toward the distant red glow of the main clinic.
